title: Moments in Evangelion that made you angry
display_title: Moments in Evangelion that made you angry
wikitext:
[]: Moments in Evangelion that made you angry             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Sun Sep 11, 2005 11:10 am Were there any moments in Evangelion (tv and movie) that made you feel really angry? Here are mine: Shinji never getting his revenge on NERV (ep. 19) The ending of EoE. The coldness of Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Sep 11, 2005 11:40 am I retreat into Self-Pity, it's so easy ~ Deleted.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 11, 2005 11:45 am In decreasing order of vehemence, I'm afraid there is only one contender in the top three... Shinji in EoE - he needed a good hiding, to help him buck his ideas up. Shinji in ep#18 - not lifting a finger to try and help Touji. Shinji in ep#4 - being lippy to Misato during the debriefing See also the commentary for Cut #100+ in http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-04/episode-04A-scene3.html#cut100 (Edit: fix URL)

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Sep 11, 2005 11:52 am Kaji's death - It didn't have as much as an impact as the manga version did. I think if they combined the events in the anime with the death in the manga, it'd be okay. Jet Alone - That whole episode annoys me for some reason. Err, can't think of any others.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Sun Sep 11, 2005 12:42 pm sachiel wrote: Jet Alone - That whole episode annoys me for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Sep 11, 2005 1:08 pm Shinji's general attidtude in the first half of EoE. As the Tinesinator said, he just needed a good slap.

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Sun Sep 11, 2005 4:11 pm when eva 03 got killed no eva 04 dead Asuka I didn't get the ending (is Shinji and Asuka the new adam and eve?)

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sun Sep 11, 2005 4:14 pm Okay, what pissed me off the most was definatly Gendo starting up the dummy plug in Ambivilance(right episode, I hope. I only remember names). I know, I know, I guess he had a somewhat logical reason, but it just seemed like he got nervous because of his own credibility or something. The fact that Shinji didn't react didn't annoy me much - It still is his father, like it or not, and in more ways then one, gendo's choice is final. Wether he wants to or not, he has to respect his disicion. Filial piety and all that crap, ne? Then, after that, I guess when Shinji tells Rei, "When you squeezed the cloth, it reminded me of a mother." Maybe it wasn't anger, but shock at the stupidity of the comment. All I was thinking was, "WAY TO GO, SOCIAL SKILLS!" Geez, that was so effing stupid. Humm, I cant think of anymore...but I know I got mad a lot...

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Sep 11, 2005 4:14 pm Hand of God wrote: when eva 03 got killed no eva 04 dead Asuka I didn't get the ending (is Shinji and Asuka the new adam and eve?)

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Sun Sep 11, 2005 4:18 pm sachiel wrote: Hand of God wrote: when eva 03 got killed no eva 04 dead Asuka I didn't get the ending (is Shinji and Asuka the new adam and eve?)

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Sep 11, 2005 4:28 pm Hand of God wrote: sachiel wrote: Hand of God wrote: when eva 03 got killed no eva 04 dead Asuka I didn't get the ending (is Shinji and Asuka the new adam and eve?)

[]:             Quote Post by wrack » Sun Sep 11, 2005 5:37 pm Naturally, beating some sense to Shinji came in mind more than once throught the series. I certainly would find it a bit embarassing if someone told me that I was gonna be a great dad in the age of 14. The whole Eva 3 event made no sense in general. "Dammit, blow it's leg of or something", I scream, but no, they just sit around in bushes gasping while the thing rips them all to pieces. It's funny though. Everyone always just ends up in the hospital when they're in their Evas, no matter how bad they are mangled.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 11, 2005 5:39 pm Hand of God wrote: hey I just read that from a page in spanish, don't remember wich one though, but still I don't get why they r the only 2 people in the fricking world

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Sun Sep 11, 2005 5:48 pm When Kom Susser Tod started playing and all the screwed up children's drawings appear. It made me angry and sad for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Sun Sep 11, 2005 7:07 pm Shnooks wrote: Then, after that, I guess when Shinji tells Rei, "When you squeezed the cloth, it reminded me of a mother." Maybe it wasn't anger, but shock at the stupidity of the comment. All I was thinking was, "WAY TO GO, SOCIAL SKILLS!" Geez, that was so effing stupid.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Sep 11, 2005 7:48 pm I don't really remember being angered by anything in Evangelion. For the most part, I remember constantly thinking, Damn, I like this show.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Sep 11, 2005 9:32 pm Misato kissing Shinji - NOT THAT KIND OF LOVE BITCH ! Gendo's sobby im sorry to yui in EOE - BASTARD YOU TREATED MY SONG LIKE CRAP FOR TEN YEARS! YOU LOVED ME WHY AGAIN SOMTHING ABOUT MAKING YOU FEEL LOVED AND NOT ALONE ANOYMORE? The last scene " How disgusting " (inseter your favorate translation here sub fans) - I know that fat asian bastard though to himself " one more mind fuck for the road" as he wrote that ending, or improved it or whatever. On the flip side I smile every time I see Rei turn on gendo. Good girl turn of your basterd creator good girl.

[]:             Quote Post by Hiromakuta » Mon Sep 12, 2005 5:41 am What made me angry? The fact that Anno just to ensure that the viewer would have pity of Asuka, in EOE, he literally tortured her, just after she was prollific for finding that her "mother" was in Unit 02. The fact that Rei was like this during 3/4 of the show: -_- And Shinji was the human equivalent of Marvin from The HitchickerÂ´s guide to the Galaxy.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 12, 2005 1:22 pm Hiromakuta wrote: The fact that Anno just to ensure that the viewer would have pity of Asuka, in EOE, he literally tortured her,

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Mon Sep 12, 2005 2:57 pm Hey, on the topic of Rei, can anyone comment on Rei's stance (like at the end of episode 12, at the ramen place)? When you consider Rei's personality it just seems bizarre that Rei has that casual posture.
